title: Hexdentity
description: A hex addon allowing you to shapeshift using identity mod!
body:
Hexdentity is a Hex Casting addon with one lingering question,,,

What happens to a player when they can be _anything_?

This addon introduces several new iotas that allow casters to manipulate themselves and morph into new forms (other mobs) and also reflect on what form they are...


- Shapeshifter’s Gambit allows a caster to set the entity they (or target player) will transform into, at the cost of a very little amount of Amethyst Dust.
- Shapeshifter’s Reflection reveals to the caster, the entity type the entity is currently shapeshifted into, consuming only a negligible amount of media.

Hexdentity also includes itself into the Hex Notebook, under Integrations

If you have any questions message me on Discord at @awesomebossdj7
or on Fluxer at awesomebossdj7#0308
